---
name: Bug report
about: Report a visual, content, or build issue
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Issue

Describe the issue.

## Affected slice

State which section, component, route, or content surface is affected.

## Reproduction

1.
2.
3.

## Expected

What should happen?

## Actual

What happened instead?

## Source of truth check

Which existing file, section, or content source should be corrected instead of duplicated?

## Duplication check

- [ ] I searched for an existing issue with the same root cause.
- [ ] I checked whether this is already covered by an existing section or file.

## Validation target

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`

## Follow-up workflow

If this bug requires a fix slice, create a new issue, branch, and PR sequence instead of mixing it into unrelated in-flight work.

-

## Evidence

- Attach a screenshot or link to the relevant desktop surface if the issue is visual or layout-related.
